title: Dollhouse
tmdbOverview: After losing their child, a mother finds solace in a life-sized ancient doll she finds on the market.  When a new daughter enters the family's life, strange things begin to happen and no matter how hard the family tries to get rid of it, the doll always finds its way back.
synopsis: Dollhouse (2025) is a horror and mystery film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on TMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a +13 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
